title: I Saw the Devil
posterAlt: I Saw the Devil (2010) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. Soo-hyeon, a top-secret agent, decides to track down the murderer himself. He promises himself that he will do everything in his power to take vengeance against the killer, even if it means that he must become a monster himself.
synopsis: I Saw the Devil is a 2010 thriller and horror film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
